ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" REAL /* Credits assigned to the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Syllabus or link to the syllabus */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the course information was last updated */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "instructor" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor (foreign key to faculty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor FOREIGN KEY ("instructor") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is being taken */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is being taken */,
  "grade_status" TEXT /* Status of the grade (e.g., pending, graded, incomplete) */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final grade for the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Overall attendance percentage for the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, assignment) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "assessment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "assessment_materials" TEXT /* Materials needed for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade obtained by the student in the assessment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was submitted */,
  "grading_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was graded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the instructor regarding the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the attendance record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who marked the attendance (foreign key to faculty) */,
  "class_topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the class */,
  "class_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the class in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* Indicates if the faculty member is the head of the department */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member joined the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty mapping */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the faculty member is teaching */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member in the course (e.g., primary instructor, teaching assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., announcement, reminder, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)
